description_long: This is a long, low-profile cabinet with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a rectangular body and four slender, angled metal legs. The exterior appears to be finished in a gray wood veneer, giving it a sleek and contemporary look suitable for urban interiors or public spaces. The front face is divided into several panels, likely concealing doors or drawers, but no handles are visible, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism. The top surface is flat and expansive, ideal for placing decorative items, electronics, or other objects. The sides and back are plain, maintaining the clean lines and uniform finish of the piece. Its sturdy construction and neutral color palette make it versatile for use in lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living rooms.
description: A long, gray wood veneer cabinet with a flat top, clean lines, and slender metal legs, featuring a minimalist, handle-free design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length, divided panels, and two pairs of angled metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow depth and solid, unadorned side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, uninterrupted back surface and the legs' placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a simple, flat panel.
